channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Largest reported naval gathering in U.S. history sails into New York Harbor for America's 250th
item.description: Vice President J.D. Vance attended the International Naval Review 250 on Independence Day at the Port of New York and New Jersey to mark America's...

item.title: America's first major offshore wind project is up and running, but plagued with problems
item.description: Massachusetts Governor Maura Healey recently celebrated the completion of Vineyard Wind, the nation's first commercial-scale offshore wind farm, which she...

item.title: Celebrate American Vastness, in All Its Glory
item.description: Our nation is one of vibrant colors and dazzling fireworks.

item.title: Twenty-Five Movies to Celebrate America at 250
item.description: They reveal who we are and why this vast, lively, and spirited nation is worth fighting for.
